title: Circuit breaker
abstract: The invention relates to a hybrid circuit breaker for interrupting a current in an electrical circuit line, the hybrid circuit breaker comprising: - an input terminal for connection to a power line and an output terminal for connection to a DC system; - a first solid state switching device connected to the input terminal; - a mechanical isolator relay arranged in series with the first solid state switching device and connected to the output terminal; - a crowbar circuit electrically connected between the output terminal and ground; and - a controller for controlling the first solid state switching device, the mechanical isolator relay and the crowbar circuit.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. Hybrid circuit breaker (1) for interrupting a current in an electrical circuit line, the hybrid circuit breaker (1) comprising: - an input terminal (2) for connection to a power line and an output terminal (3) for connection to a DC system (4, 5); - a first solid state switching device (6) connected to the input terminal (2); - a mechanical isolator relay (8) arranged in series with the first solid state switching device (6) and connected to the output terminal (3); characterized by - a crowbar circuit (9, 10) electrically connected between the output terminal (3) and ground or mid-pole (M) ; - a controller (7) for controlling the first solid state switching device (6), the mechanical isolator relay (8) and the crowbar circuit (9, 10) . 2. Hybrid circuit breaker (1) according to claim 1, wherein the mechanical isolator relay (8) connects in a connected position the first solid state switching device (6) with the output terminal (3) and connects in a disconnected position the output terminal (3) with ground or mid-pole (M) . 3. Hybrid circuit breaker (1) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the crowbar circuit (9, 10) comprises arranged in series a second solid state switching device (9) and a resistor ( 10 ) . 4. Hybrid circuit breaker (1) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the solid state switching device (6, 9) comprises a semiconductor like a FET, MOSFET or IGBT. 5. Hybrid circuit breaker (1) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the controller (7) comprises a 

current sensor for sensing a short in the DC system (4, 5) . 6. Hybrid circuit breaker (1) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the mechanical isolator relay is a double-pole isolator relay of which a first pole is arranged between the first solid state switching device (6) and the output terminal (3), the hybrid circuit breaker (1) further comprising a second input terminal for connection to a mid pole (M) line and a second output terminal for connection to a DC system (4, 5), wherein the second pole is electrically arranged between the second input terminal and the second output terminal.
